name: Creamy Turkey-Veggie Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince onion and celery.
2. Heat butter in a large pot over medium heat.
3. Add the minced onion and celery; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add sweet potatoes, zucchini, and broccoli to the pot. Sauté for another 5 minutes until the vegetables begin to soften.
5. Stir in turkey broth and simmer for a few minutes.
6. Add diced potatoes and seasonings (salt, cayenne pepper, and black pepper). Simmer for an additional 10 minutes or until all vegetables are tender.
7. Stir in the diced turkey and light cream. Heat through until everything is evenly warm.
